name: Screen Color Filter
author: Ava
description: Apply a global screen color tint controllable from Home Assistant
detail_description: Adds a full-screen translucent overlay above all Ava layers. Select off, red, blue, dark, yellow, green, or gray from Home Assistant. Touch input passes through the tint layer.

config.label: Filter Opacity
config.dialogHint: Default 30. Lower values keep content readable; higher values deepen the tint.
